Work in context

AI agents are only as good as their context Agents have the context they need before they act - ensuring work is being carried out confidently and accurately.

Connect your team’s agents and MCP-connected tools on our open platform.

Bring your own agent

Connect agents from any AI provider and put them to work directly inside your workflows.

Use your favorite AI tools

Orchestrate workflows

Let work flow

Automate how work moves between people and agents
Get Started

Let work flow

Automate how work moves between people and agents
Get Started

Full control

Agent activity
Track every agent action across your organization with a real-time log of what was done and when.
Permissions
Define exactly which data the agent can access, and whether it has permission to edit, create, or only read information.
Human in the loop
Validate your agents’ actions before activating it with simulation mode.
AI cost center
Track AI usage and spend per team and set limits and alerts.
Content ownership
You retain ownership of the content you provide, and the content generated by AI.
No data training
Your data is never used to train AI models — what happens in your workspace stays in your workspace.

Gain full control

Track every agent action across your organization with a real-time log of what was done and when.

Define exactly which data the agent can access, and whether it has permission to edit, create, or only read information.

Validate your agents’ actions before activating it with simulation mode.

Track AI usage and spend per team and set limits and alerts.

You retain ownership of the content you provide, and the content generated by AI.

Your data is never used to train AI models — what happens in your workspace stays in your workspace.
